description: You are a front-of-house engineer at The Signal Room. Prepare the Ardour session 'MyProject' for a live band rehearsal recording by configuring the tracks, markers, and assets. Ensure the session contains only these six tracks with the specified settings: 'Kick Drum' (Pan Center, Gain -3 dB, Unmuted), 'Snare Drum' (Pan Slightly Right ~60%, Gain -3 dB, Unmuted), 'Bass DI' (Pan Center, Gain -6 dB, Unmuted), 'Electric Guitar' (Pan Hard Left ~0%, Gain -6 dB, Unmuted), 'Lead Vocal' (Pan Center, Gain 0 dB, Unmuted), and 'Room Mic' (Pan Center, Gain -12 dB, Muted). Import the audio file from /home/ga/Audio/import_me.wav onto the 'Room Mic' track. Place a marker named 'Soundcheck' near the start of the session and a marker named 'Take 1' further along the timeline. Delete any unused tracks such as 'Audio 1' and save the session.
